applied_optimizations.name: Fused GELU+Softmax Triton kernel
applied_optimizations.description: Replaced separate F.gelu + F.softmax with fused Triton kernel. Uses manual tanh implementation (tl.math.tanh unavailable on ROCm). Matmul uses PyTorch's optimized rocBLAS backend.

attempted_but_failed.name: Full fused matmul+GELU Triton kernel
attempted_but_failed.reason: LLVM translation error: unrealized_conversion_cast with tl.dot on ROCm Triton
attempted_but_failed.error: RuntimeError: failed to translate module to LLVM IR

notes: tl.math.tanh is UNAVAILABLE on ROCm - must use manual implementation with tl.math.exp
BLOCK_SIZE must be >= N for row-wise kernels; for N=8192, BLOCK_SIZE=8192 works
GEMM dominates at 98% of runtime - limited optimization headroom since rocBLAS is already highly optimized

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_4
attempted_but_failed.reason: Agent has produced no output in trials 2, 3, and 4. Providing complete copy-paste code to avoid timeouts or confusion. Focus on torch.compile since GEMM is 98% and tl.dot is broken on ROCm.

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_5
attempted_but_failed.reason: Agent has produced no output for 4 consecutive trials. Providing an ultra-minimal, single-command approach with the complete file to write. The key optimization is torch.compile on F.linear to speed u
